title: Bartender
description:
We are seeking a skilled and friendly Bartender to join our food and beverage team. The Bartender is responsible for preparing and serving alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages, providing excellent guest service, and maintaining a clean, organized bar area. The ideal candidate is knowledgeable about drinks, attentive to guests, and able to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

Responsibilities:

  • Responsible for efficient service of alcoholic & non-alcoholic beverages from the bar
  • To check all stations before and after shifts to ensure compliance, cleanliness, sufficient supplies and equipment
  • To monitor bar operations stocks and/or inventory and ensure they are in good condition for guests usage
  • Selecting and mixing ingredients, peel, slice and pit fruit for garnishing drinks
  • Make recommendations and answer all related inquiries
  • Complying with all health, safety and hygiene standards and policies
  • Handle stock requisition, collection, replenishment and disposal of used stock
  • Handle all beverage production in accordance with the outlet standards and recipes, with highest quality and freshness
  • Arranges bottles and glasses to maintain an attractive display in the bar area

What are we looking for?

  • At least 1 year of working experience is required for this position
  • Service-oriented, good interpersonal and customer service skills
  • An attitude that is keen and willing to learn
  • Good knowledge of wine, beer and spirits
  • Good teamwork and able to work in a fast paced environment
  • Passionate working in Food and Beverage Industry

If you pride yourself on providing great personalized service and are keen to work for a progressive brand, then this an opportunity to get excited about!

APPLY NOW to join our team, enjoy incredible career development opportunities! Please send your resume with details on experience, last drawn and expected salary, via APPLY NOW button below.

(We regret that only short listed candidates will be notified)

postedCompany.description:
In a metropolitan city like Singapore, where space is a luxury, finding a non-claustrophobic space to wind down and relax is not exactly an easy task. Located in Seletar area, Wheeler’s Estate occupies almost 2 acres of land making itself the largest F&B and event venue in Singapore promoting lifestyle and entertainment.

At Wheeler’s Estate, we proudly showcase our Australian Chef with his distinctive Modern Australian cuisine together with an outdoor charcoal grill – a perfect gathering spot for friends and families. With our exquisite scenic lawn and colonial architecture, we provide the perfect location for a wedding, corporate and other events that want to exude intimacy and uniqueness.

Wheeler's Estate is the ideal working environment for those who seek challenges and opportunities to develop their passion and skills in the F&B sector. We are constantly on a lookout for individuals who endorse our vision and are passionate to interact with people from all walks of life - crafting an intimate and unique experience for stakeholders of Wheeler’s Estate.
postedCompany.name: WHEELER'S ESTATE PTE. LTD.
